summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Suplementos Mais Baratos trust/social proof page. All major features tested including hero section, animated statistics, video testimonials, background music, trust features, social proof images, payment methods, WhatsApp integration, and mobile responsiveness.

media_issues.issue: Audio autoplay prevented due to 'no supported sources' error
media_issues.impact: Background music doesn't play automatically after user interaction
media_issues.details: Console shows 'NotSupportedError: The element has no supported sources' - audio URL may be inaccessible

media_issues.issue: Mixed content warnings for HTTP resources on HTTPS site
media_issues.impact: Browser automatically upgrades HTTP to HTTPS which may cause loading issues
media_issues.details: Video and audio URLs use HTTP protocol while site is served over HTTPS

passed_tests: Page loads successfully with proper structure
Fixed header with MB logo and WhatsApp button functional
Hero section with animated statistics (50,000+, 10+, 98%) working correctly
User interaction system triggers video autoplay successfully
All 6 trust feature cards present (Frete Grátis, Envio 24-48h, Garantia 7 Dias, Produtos Importados, +50.000 Clientes, 10+ Anos de Mercado)
Social proof images loading correctly (3/3 images from customer-assets.emergentagent.com)
Payment methods section showing all 9 card brands (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Elo, Hipercard, Diners Club, Discover, JCB, PIX)
WhatsApp links functional with correct phone number (5521972232170) and message
CTA button 'COMPRAR AGORA VIA WHATSAPP' working correctly
Footer with company information displaying properly
Audio toggle button appears after user interaction
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Video section with controls and autoplay after interaction
Scroll animations and interactions functioning properly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix background audio loading issue - the audio URL may be inaccessible or the file format is not supported. Consider using HTTPS URLs for all media resources to avoid mixed content warnings.
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All major functionality working except background audio autoplay
